Mark Allen - Zhang Anda
The Pistol takes the final frame of the session to reduce his arrears overnight.
They resume at 10am on Sunday 4 274

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 37min Wessel Nijman has rocked Ryan Searle with a 104 average to continue his perfect record against
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 37min Wessel Nijman has rocked Ryan Searle with a 104 average to continue his perfect record against Heavy Metal.
The Dutchman has already won four titles in 2026 and is one of the most dangerous players on tour at the moment.
He'll face either Stephen Bunting or Mickey Mansell in Mostrar más 131
